headline: AI for Supply Chain: Optimization, Vehicle Routing, and Logistics Intelligence
description: AI is transforming global supply chains — from optimizing delivery routes in real-time to predicting demand weeks ahead. Deep reinforcement learning and large-scale optimization algorithms reduce logistics costs by 15-25% while improving delivery reliability, making AI the competitive backbone of modern e-commerce, freight, and humanitarian logistics.

citation.name: Artificial Intelligence in Supply Chain Optimization: A Comprehensive Systematic Review of 199 Articles
Multi-objective optimization for dynamic logistics using hierarchical deep reinforcement learning
